text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's heeeere! My second summer camp! There's no
time for fan comics this year. I gotta train, train,
train!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've got some breaking news from King.
Apparently, my top oshi from the younger classes
will also be running in the upcoming autumn
Tenno Sho! Yesss!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna take what I learned about determination from King and share it with this younger racer. Gasp! It'll be like I'm her big sister! I have to do my best so I'm ready for this fall!
